title: P0: Fix LlmEvaluatorImpl fast-path suppressing world divergence detection
description:
The LLM evaluator's fast-path (line 63-71 of LlmEvaluatorImpl.cs) checks `failureCount == 0` and returns "continue" before inspecting the WorldStateDiff. Fire-and-forget tools (PlaceBlock, MineBlock) always report Success=true at dispatch time, so the diff is never consulted during normal operation — the observe→compare→evaluate loop is dead code.

Fix: Add `diff?.HasMismatch == true` check after the all-succeeded fast-path so divergence triggers replan. Also include diff context in the LLM prompt unconditionally so the LLM can reason about matched vs mismatched expectations.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P0-2
